auth.SIGN_IN_DESCRIPTION: Enter your email and password to sign in
auth.SIGN_UP_DESCRIPTION: Create an account to get started

signUpForm.confirmNotRussianResident: I confirm that I am not a resident of the Russian Federation

quickStart.title: Quick Start
quickStart.description: Add MCP Moira to your AI assistant. Choose your client below:

claude-web.description:
1. Go to claude.ai → Settings → Connectors
2. Click "Add custom connector"
3. Enter server URL and click "Connect"
4. Complete OAuth in browser

Requires Pro/Max/Team/Enterprise plan.

chatgpt.description:
1. Go to chat.openai.com → Settings → Connectors
2. Click "Add connector"
3. Enter name "MCP Moira" and server URL
4. Complete OAuth authentication

Requires Plus or Pro plan.

claude-code.authIntro: Then authenticate with your MCP Moira account:
claude-code.authContent:
Browser will open for OAuth authentication.
Authorize and return to terminal.

claude-desktop.description:
1. Open Settings (⌘+,) → Connectors tab
2. Click "Add custom connector"
3. Enter server URL and click "Connect"
4. Browser opens for OAuth → Done

No config file editing needed.

cursor.authIntro: Then authenticate with your MCP Moira account:
cursor.authContent:
Browser will open for OAuth authentication.
Authorize and return to Cursor.

vscode.authIntro: Then authenticate with your MCP Moira account:
vscode.authContent:
Browser will open for OAuth authentication.
Authorize and return to VS Code.

perplexity.description:
1. Install PerplexityXPC helper (Settings → Connectors → Install Helper)
2. Click "Add Connector"
3. Enter server name and MCP command
4. Complete OAuth authentication

Paid plan recommended. Uses mcp-remote bridge.

copilot-cli.authIntro: After saving the config file, authenticate:
copilot-cli.authContent:
1. Start a Copilot CLI session
2. Type /mcp
3. Select "moira" → Authenticate
→ Browser opens for OAuth

betaWarningBanner.title: Beta Version:
betaWarningBanner.message: The system is under development. Data loss, functionality changes, or terms of use modifications are possible. We do our best to prevent this. Thank you for understanding.

betaAgreementModal.functionalityWarning: Functionality: System behavior may change. We strive to minimize inconvenience.
betaAgreementModal.termsWarning: Terms of Use: May be modified as the project develops.
betaAgreementModal.helpImprove: Help us improve the system with your feedback
